task_completion.description: Navigate to the Add Inventory or New Item screen in HospitalRun.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should show the HospitalRun interface with an active form for adding a new inventory item.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Name and Description for the medical supply.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field should contain 'BD Vacutainer SST Tubes'. The 'Description' field should contain 'BD Vacutainer SST Serum Separation Tubes 8.5mL Gold Closure 16x100mm' (or at least the keywords Serum, Separation, 8.5mL, 16x100mm).

task_completion.description: Select the correct Type and enter the Cross Reference (Product #).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Item Type' or 'Type' dropdown/field should be set to 'Supply'. The 'Cross Reference' or 'Product #' field should contain '367988'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Price and Distribution Unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Price' field should show '85.50' (or between 84.50 and 86.50). The 'Distribution Unit' field should show 'Box'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Quantity and Reorder Point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Quantity' field should show '500' (or between 495 and 505). The 'Reorder Point' field should show '100'.

task_completion.description: Save the new inventory item successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification indicating the item was added, or the new item 'BD Vacutainer SST Tubes' appearing in the main inventory list view.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the HospitalRun graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the HospitalRun web application being used in a browser, not a terminal or API testing tool.

integrity.description: The agent typed the information into the actual application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text should be visible inside the proper input fields of the HospitalRun 'Add Item' form, rather than in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to alter the HTML of an existing inventory item.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The item must be added with the following exact details: Name: 'BD Vacutainer SST Tubes', Description must include keywords ['Serum', 'Separation', '8.5mL', '16x100mm'], Type: 'Supply', Cross Reference: '367988', Reorder Point: 100, Price: 85.50 (acceptable range 84.50 - 86.50), Distribution Unit: 'Box', Quantity: 500 (acceptable range 495 - 505).
